title: [ImportVerilog] Add assignment statements
body:
Add continuous, blocking, and non-blocking assignments to the Moore dialect. These represent the corresponding constructs in SystemVerilog.

Add a `ScopedHashTable` to the ImportVerilog conversion context and add variable declarations to it. This allows expression conversion to resolve name expressions to the MLIR value that was generated for the corresponding declaration. The Slang AST node pointer itself is used as a lookup key, since the AST already has all names resolved.

Add a basic expression handling mechanism to the ImportVerilog conversion. A new `convertExpression` entry point calls an `ExprVisitor` to convert expression nodes in the Slang AST to the corresponding MLIR operations. This currently only supports name expressions, which simply looks up the converted MLIR value for whatever the name was resolved to, and blocking and non-blocking assignments.

Extend the module conversion to properly handle continuous assignments at the module level.

Thanks @albertethon, @hailongSun2000, and @angelzzzzz for the help to get this started.
